summary: Excellent audience recording captures a psychedelic, on‑point performance highlighted by a fiery Scarlet Begonias and superb Lost Sailor/Althea pairing.
review: The AUD tape sounds as clear and balanced as a modern matrix, making the show easy to enjoy. Garcia and Lesh are locked in with intricate, psychedelic playing while the first set’s cowboy‑song vibe gives way to standout moments like Scarlet Begonias, Lost Sailor/Althea and an exquisite Eyes of the World jam featuring Phil’s solo. Overall the performance feels tight, inspired, and full of energy.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 5‑star review praises both musical performance and recording quality; strong positive language across the board leads to a near‑top rating despite limited data.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says the AUD is as good as a recent matrix, noting no audible flaws and a clear, well‑balanced mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set leans heavily on cowboy‑song material, then transitions into tighter, psychedelic moments; the Lost/Althea pairing and a dynamic Scarlet transition are highlighted as high points.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia is described as "very on" with psychedelic intricacy, delivering tight lead work throughout.
band_member_comments.Phil: "The Phil jam out of Eyes is sweet," indicating a standout bass solo during Eyes of the World.
